# Changelog

cascivo versions packages independently with
[Changesets](https://github.com/changesets/changesets). Full release notes
live in each package; this index links them. Machine-readable major/minor
history: [breaking-changes.json](https://cascivo.com/breaking-changes.json).

| Package             | Version | Latest feature release                                                                   | Changelog                                   |
| ------------------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `@cascivo/charts`   | 0.3.4   | 0.3.0 ‚Äî PieChart: donut `centerValue`/`centerLabel` (+ `centerSlot`), `thickness`/`inner | [CHANGELOG](packages/charts/CHANGELOG.md)   |
| `cascivo`           | 0.2.0   | 0.2.0 ‚Äî Add an app scaffold generator. The `cascivo create [name]` CLI command scaffolds | [CHANGELOG](packages/cli/CHANGELOG.md)      |
| `@cascivo/core`     | 0.2.3   | 0.2.0 ‚Äî Make object-valued prop shapes machine-readable. `ComponentMeta` gains an option | [CHANGELOG](packages/core/CHANGELOG.md)     |
| `@cascivo/editor`   | 0.2.6   | 0.2.0 ‚Äî Large-document performance (v47): windowed (viewport-scoped) tokenization. Per-r | [CHANGELOG](packages/editor/CHANGELOG.md)   |
| `@cascivo/flow`     | 0.1.5   | ‚Äî                                                                                        | [CHANGELOG](packages/flow/CHANGELOG.md)     |
| `@cascivo/i18n`     | 0.1.11  | 0.1.0 ‚Äî Initial public release of the cascivo design system. Includes:                   | [CHANGELOG](packages/i18n/CHANGELOG.md)     |
| `@cascivo/icons`    | 0.2.3   | 0.2.0 ‚Äî Expand the icon catalog from 60 to ~440 icons by adopting the full chromicons    | [CHANGELOG](packages/icons/CHANGELOG.md)    |
| `@cascivo/mcp`      | 0.2.0   | 0.2.0 ‚Äî Add an app scaffold generator. The `cascivo create [name]` CLI command scaffolds | [CHANGELOG](packages/mcp/CHANGELOG.md)      |
| `@cascivo/react`    | 0.3.8   | 0.3.0 ‚Äî Integration-feedback fixes (from the bpmn-kit and pagome migrations):            | [CHANGELOG](packages/react/CHANGELOG.md)    |
| `@cascivo/registry` | 0.1.5   | 0.1.0 ‚Äî Initial public release of the cascivo design system. Includes:                   | [CHANGELOG](packages/registry/CHANGELOG.md) |
| `@cascivo/storage`  | 0.1.6   | 0.1.0 ‚Äî Initial public release of the cascivo design system. Includes:                   | [CHANGELOG](packages/storage/CHANGELOG.md)  |
| `@cascivo/themes`   | 0.2.7   | 0.2.0 ‚Äî v37 migration hardening ‚Äî fixes from the boringtools migration feedback.         | [CHANGELOG](packages/themes/CHANGELOG.md)   |
| `@cascivo/tokens`   | 0.3.5   | 0.3.0 ‚Äî Integration-feedback fixes (from the bpmn-kit and pagome migrations):            | [CHANGELOG](packages/tokens/CHANGELOG.md)   |
